title: Ender Pearl Trailss
description: This mod adds client side trails behind ender pearl which looks cool btw.
body: # Ender Pearl Trails Mod The **Ender Pearl Trailss Mod** enhances your Minecraft experience by adding visually stunning trails behind ender pearls as they travel through the air. This mod is designed for Fabric and is compatible with all Minecraft versions from **1.20** to **1.21**. ![ezgif-4-f7ae6356bb](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/876a7e97-7b3f-49ee-ab05-463e8762e6ad) ## Planned Features- - Toggle command to enable/disable trails. - Ability to customize ## **Supported versions-** `Fabric 1.20` to `Fabric 1.21` ## **Requirements-** - Fabric API - Minecraft ofc 💀 _This project is under the MIT License, made in india btw_ 🇮🇳
